description_long: This is a large, two-story bungalow with a light beige, multi-gabled roof and a prominent central entrance framed by blue columns and stonework. The facade features numerous white-framed windows with blue shutters, arranged in both symmetrical and grouped patterns, and a small covered porch at the main entrance. The building is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, bordered by a low stone wall and landscaped with bushes and trees. A flagpole with an orange flag sits atop the central roof peak, adding a distinctive touch. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious backyard with additional greenery and a paved walkway. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort and curb appeal.
description: A spacious two-story bungalow with a beige gabled roof, blue accents, and extensive windows, surrounded by landscaped lawns and a stone border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with blue columns, symmetrical windows, and a central flagpole on the roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bay windows, blue shutters, and the sloped driveway leading to the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large backyard, grouped windows, and additional landscaping along the stone wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the wide lawn, rear porch, and more bay windows with blue accents.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and bay windows
